summary: Frontend-only testing for 3 new features: (1) localStorage filter persistence on VenueSearchPage, (2) Gallery Modal verification, (3) RM Fallback UI verification. All tests pass. Filter persistence works correctly at /venues/search endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: VenueSearchPage filter persistence is on /venues/search, NOT /venues. The /venues route goes to CityHubPage. Main agent should ensure users navigate to /venues/search for filter functionality.
RM Fallback UI code is correctly implemented (lines 827-841 EnquiryForm.js) but cannot be visually tested because the API returns RMs. To test fallback, backend would need to return empty RMs array.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Filter persistence is on /venues/search (VenueSearchPage), not /venues (CityHubPage). Key localStorage key: bmv_search_filters. Routes: /venues → CityHubPage, /venues/search → VenueSearchPage (with filter sidebar), /venues/:citySlug/:venueSlug → VenuePublicPage, /venues/venue_* → VenueDetailPage.

filter_persistence.TEST 1 - Set filter, navigate away, retu: PASS - Set city=Delhi, navigated to venue detail, returned to /venues/search, filter restored from localStorage
filter_persistence.TEST 2 - Clear All clears localStorage: PASS - Clicking Clear All removed city filter from localStorage, dropdown reset to 'All Cities'
filter_persistence.TEST 3 - URL params priority: PASS - Despite localStorage having 'Gurgaon', navigating with ?city=Delhi showed Delhi (URL param took priority)

enquiry_form.Step 3 - RM Selection: PASS (3 RM cards shown: Rahul Sharma, Priya Singh, Amit Kumar)

rm_fallback_ui.Code implementation review: PASS - Fallback UI code correctly implemented at EnquiryForm.js lines 827-841
rm_fallback_ui.Visual test: SKIPPED - API returns RMs, so fallback UI not triggered. Fallback shows when rms.length === 0

mocked_features.Video tab content: MOCKED - Shows placeholder with 'Video Walkthrough' message
mocked_features.360° tab content: MOCKED - Shows placeholder with '360° Virtual Tour' message

routing_notes./venues/search: VenueSearchPage - full filter sidebar with localStorage persistence
routing_notes./venues/venue_*: VenueDetailPage - venue by ID, has gallery modal
